title: Blay Waystone Placement Bug Fix
description: BlayWaystone will block structure piece with waystone being placed
body:
# Blay Waystone Placement Bug Fix

Fixes a known issue where **Blay’s Waystones** can prevent certain structures from generating properly in world generation — such as the bug described [here](https://github.com/celsiusqc/TowersOfTheWildModded/issues/17#issuecomment-2191305831).

---

## 🧩 Overview

This mod provides a **data-driven fix** for the **Waystone placement logic** that conflicts with structure templates.
Powered by **Lithostitched** and **Patched**, it dynamically injects waystones into structure pools during world generation, allowing much finer control.

---

## ⚙️ Features

* ✅ **Fixes structure placement conflicts** caused by Waystones.
* 🧱 **Data-driven injection** — fully configurable via datapacks.
* 🔧 **Customizable template pool targeting** — not limited to `/houses`; you can specify any pool suffix you want.
* 🏘️ Works with **both vanilla and modded villages**, offering flexibility for modpack creators.
* 💾 Compatible with Lithostitched-based patching pipelines.

---

## 🗂️ Configuration

You can adjust:

* `weight` and `count` of injected waystones.
* The **target structure pool** for injection.

These are defined in datapacks, meaning you can tune the behavior without modifying the mod itself.

---

## 🚨 Important

If you encounter any structure generation issues **while using this mod**, please **report them here**, not to the original Blay’s Waystones project.
